name: Stuffed Brinjals
recipeInstructions:
1. On each eggplant, make 4 crosswise cuts about halfway through.
2. Grind the remaining ingredients (except ghee or oil) to a fine paste.
3. Stuff the paste into the cuts of each eggplant.
4. Heat ghee or oil in a pan large enough to hold the eggplants.
5. Cook the eggplants, covered, over low heat until they are done, stirring occasionally.
6. Serve hot.
